title: linum narbonense subsp. barrasii
intro: Linum narbonense subsp. barrasii, also known as the Narrow-leaved Flax or Blue Flax, is a plant species in the flax family that is native to the western Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to its high content of polyphenols and lignans. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. Linum narbonense subsp. barrasii can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and it has been traditionally used to support wound healing and skin health.
